name: fun-for-kids-provider-toolkit
description: Provider portal automation toolkit for Codex via the Fun for Kids MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Run provider workflows over the Fun for Kids MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to the Fun for Kids provider automation surface for leads, customers, bookings, sessions, comms, tasks, content, and provider settings with dry-run and approval safeguards.
defaultPrompt: Use fun-for-kids-provider to move a lead to a booked trial.
Use fun-for-kids-provider to transfer a booking and add a note.
Use fun-for-kids-provider to draft and send a follow-up campaign.
